analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The current implementation includes sections on black hole formation, types, effects, and a quiz. The theme uses dark backgrounds with cosmic colors (purple, blue, black) and animations for a dynamic experience. The CSS includes animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript handles interactive features like a quiz, slide show, and mobile menu.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with more detailed animations for black hole visuals, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and smooth transitions for a more immersive cosmic experience.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
